hooks.description: Compile Java after edits to catch errors immediately
hooks.command: bash -lc 'if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_PATH" | grep -qE "\.java$"; then cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)" && ./gradlew compileJava --console=plain --warning-mode=none 2>&1 | tail -50; else exit 0; fi'

hooks.description: Block destructive commands (rm -rf, dd, mkfs, chmod 777 /) and any recursive removal under /
hooks.command: bash -lc 'cmd="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "rm +-rf? +/|rm +-rf? +~|rm +-rf? +\$HOME|dd +if=|mkfs\.|:\(\)\{|chmod +-?R? +777 +/|chown +-?R? +root"; then echo BLOCKED: destructive pattern: "$cmd"; exit 2; fi; exit 0'
